messages.content:
Answer the question for each person.

How often do they see their neighbours?
Elise: Ответ

Marc: Ответ
As an AI language model, I do not have access to personal information. Therefore, I cannot provide an answer to this question.

Complete the summary with ONE word in each [answer].

Marc’s nearest neighbours are two cows that live [answer] miles away! Marc and his wife used to live in [answer], but they didn’t like the crowds, the noise and using public [answer]. They bought a [answer] ten years ago. Marc and his wife work [answer]. Marc says the interviewer is the [answer] person they've seen this year!

Marc’s nearest neighbors are two cows that live [rural] miles away! Marc and his wife used to live in [the city], but they didn’t like the crowds, the noise and using public [transport]. They bought a [house] ten years ago. Marc and his wife work [overseas]. Marc says the interviewer is the [nicest] person they've seen this year!

Choose the correct articles.


 
 city I’d really like to visit is 
 
 Budapest in Hungary.

The correct article to use here is "The". 

The city I’d really like to visit is Budapest in Hungary.

Choose the correct articles.
 
(an / a) city I’d really like to visit is (the / -) Budapest in Hungary.

The correct articles to use here are: 

"A city I'd really like to visit is __ Budapest in Hungary."

We use "a" because Budapest is not specified before and is not a specific city, any city in the world would fit the statement.

"We use "the" before Budapest because it is a specific city we are talking about, and it is unique and can be identified." 

Thus, the correct sentence would be:

"A city I’d really like to visit is __ the Budapest in Hungary."

Choose the correct articles.

("an" / "a") city I’d really like to visit is ("the" / " ") Budapest in Hungary.

The correct articles are: 

"A city I'd really like to visit is _a_ Budapest in Hungary."

Since Budapest starts with the consonant sound "b", we use the article "a" instead of "an". "The" is not needed unless we are referring to a specific instance or place of Budapest.

Choose the correct articles.

We saw (a / an / the / - ) beautiful house in (a / an / the / - ) South of France but it didn’t have (a / an / the / - ) very big garden.

The correct articles to use are: 

"We saw _a_ beautiful house in _the_ South of France but it didn't have _a_ very big garden."

We use the indefinite article "a" before "beautiful house" because it is not a specific house that is being referred to. We use the definite article "the" before "South of France" to refer to a specific region. We use the indefinite article "a" before "very big garden" because it also refers to any garden and not a specific one.

Complete the sentences with a relative pronoun.

Many people use the internet for more than three hours a day, [answer] can cause stress.
Many people use the internet for more than three hours a day, _which_ can cause stress.

Complete the sentences with a relative pronoun.

That’s the restaurant [answer] we went for my dad’s birthday
That's the restaurant _where_ we went for my dad's birthday.

Complete the sentences with a relative pronoun.

Our hotel in Las Vegas, [answer] had 24-hour room service, had over 1000 bedrooms!
Our hotel in Las Vegas, _which_ had 24-hour room service, had over 1000 bedrooms!

Complete the sentences with a relative pronoun.

When I was in London, I met an artist [answer] painting of the Queen was displayed in the National Portrait Gallery.
When I was in London, I met an artist _whose_ painting of the Queen was displayed in the National Portrait Gallery.

Give the word to the definition.

a computer programming technique that allows the creation of objects that interact with each other and can be used as the foundation of others; used to create graphical user interfaces
The word is "Object-oriented programming".

Give the word to the definition.

a small Java application, usually designed to run automatically within a web page
The word is "applet".

Give the word to the definition.

an island in Indonesia, coffee (in American slang), and a programming language for internet applications
The word is "Java".
When my neighbour invited me
I'm sorry, your question seems to be incomplete. Could you please provide more context or information so that I can better understand what you are looking for?

Match the beginning to the correct ending.

(answer: on my nerves and it can be really hard getting to sleep; her own business; over for tea and cake, I couldn’t say no; friends with some of her classmates; well with most people I work with, which makes every day enjoyable; to know quite a few of our neighbours.)

When my neighbour invited me [answer]

When my neighbour invited me over for tea and cake, I couldn't say no.

I work well with most people I work with, which makes every day enjoyable.

I know quite a few of our neighbours.

She runs her own business.

My daughter is friends with some of her classmates.

My cat can get on my nerves and it can be really hard getting to sleep.
